positive: A sophisticated, stylized geometric design featuring interconnected abstract animal silhouettes—specifically a stylized fox, a majestic owl, and a playful leaping fox—interwoven into a single cohesive pattern. The elements should be arranged in a central, balanced composition suitable for repeating apparel prints. Use bold, contrasting colors like deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, and cream ivory against a clean white background. The style should be a modern, graphic vector illustration with strong, clean lines and high contrast, reminiscent of mid-century modern Scandinavian design. Focus on perfect symmetry and negative space. Highly detailed, crisp edges, flat color application, perfect scale.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, malformed, jpeg artifacts, low detail, photorealistic, messy, cluttered
